title: PGM's Medieval
description: Makes minecraft slightly realistic but medieval with tons of new weapons, armer and even blocks.
body:
Modpack designed for low end PCs that levels up minecraft in a medieval way. with 100+ mods experience minecraft like never before and explore like never before. craft tons of new weapons and armor. chop down a tree like in real life. build a castle with new deco blocks and verticle slabs.

The mod pack includes lots of new things most notable are: New armors, new weapons, excalibur textures, high and low end shaders, better clouds, first person model and better sounds.
